title: PROTOCOL 8-0-8
body:
This modpack was carefully crafted for a custom puzzle map with a narrative storyline. It includes the world you will play in, guiding you through an immersive journey filled with challenges, secrets, and atmosphere. The selected mods enhance gameplay with shaders, mechanical interactions (via Create), and immersive features. Everything is optimized for both aesthetic immersion and technical stability.

Features:
- Story-driven puzzlemap (the world u need)
- (Mechanical) puzzles (using Create)
- Complementary Shaders: Reimagined & Unbound
- Custom main menu powered by FancyMenu

# Visit the Wiki for a Game Walkthrough!
